qr-generator.seoDesc: In the digital age, scanning is the most efficient bridge between offline/online and screens/mobile. Whether it's your WeChat profile, landing page, or a simple Wi-Fi command, generate a matrix instantly with no registration required.

qr-generator.highlight1Desc: Break the monotony of black and white! Define custom colors for your brand identity. Support L, M, Q, H error correction levels to ensure codes remain scannable even if partially covered by a logo.
qr-generator.highlight2Desc: Output high-fidelity bitmaps directly for poster printing, product labels, or resumes. Clear edges ensure a high scan success rate across all devices.
qr-generator.highlight3Desc: Privacy concerns when converting sensitive data? This tool uses 100% client-side JavaScript. No data is ever uploaded to our servers, and it works offline.
qr-generator.seoFooter: Tip: When swapping foreground and background colors, ensure sufficient contrast so that scanners and camera algorithms can reliably detect the code.

unit-converter.seoTitle: Universal Web Unit Converter: Accurate Conversions for Every Scenario
unit-converter.seoDesc1: Whether you are a construction engineer used to using imperial units for overseas drawings, or a foodie baking according to foreign recipes, quickly breaking the barriers of weights and measures units formed by regional and historical factors is very valuable. This built-in toolbox provides high-precision constant comparison conversion services.
unit-converter.seoHighlightsTitle: Core advantages of a clean weights and measures converter:
unit-converter.highlight1Desc: Compared to searching for formulas in search engines and then opening a mobile phone calculator to frantically multiply and divide, you only need to enter the base number here, and all derived metric, imperial, and US standards will instantly appear in the side panel.
unit-converter.highlight2Desc: For example, the conversion from Fahrenheit (°F) to Celsius (°C) is not a simple multiplication coefficient relationship, but has a complex intercept constant. The built-in converter of the system ensures the accurate application of these highly rigorous physical formulas, eliminating the pain of manual derivation.
unit-converter.highlight3Desc: Nowadays, to use exchange rates or unit conversions, people are often forced to download a large number of cleaning apps with advertising plug-ins. This is a native clean component mounted directly on the browser core, providing zero-disturbance silent office assistance for your computer and mobile phone.
unit-converter.seoFooter: Disclaimer: Due to the underlying binary precision truncation problem of floating point numbers in JavaScript compilation and operations, occasional slight deviations at the level of millions (for example, one hundred thousandth) of decimal places may occur, but these precision losses usually do not hinder your actual business applications.

archive-converter.seoTitle: Online Archive Processor: Unpack & ZIP without Software
archive-converter.seoDesc: Avoid bulky 3rd-party managers. Unpack ZIPs or create new archives directly in your browser. Fast, clean, and no disk waste.
archive-converter.highlight1Desc: See what's inside a ZIP before extracting. Pick and download only the files you need.
archive-converter.highlight2Desc: Add local files or modify existing ones to create a whole new package in seconds.
archive-converter.highlight3Desc: Private backups, commercial contracts, or sensitive docs? 100% JS processing ensures no cloud leaks.
archive-converter.seoFooter: Limit Note: Best for archives under 1-2GB due to browser memory constraints.

rmb-converter.name: RMB Converter
rmb-converter.description: Convert numbers to Chinese financial capital characters.
rmb-converter.title: RMB Capital Converter
rmb-converter.subtitle: Translate Arabic numerals to standard Chinese financial capital format for contracts and invoices.
rmb-converter.seoTitle: RMB Capital Converter: Standard Chinese Financial Formatting
rmb-converter.seoDesc: Prevent contract tampering. Formally convert monetary amounts to traditional Chinese characters (like 壹, 贰) used in banking and legal documents.
rmb-converter.highlight1Desc: Automatically handles complex zero-placements (e.g., 1001.5 as '壹仟零壹元伍角') per banking standards.
rmb-converter.highlight2Desc: Adds mandatory accounting suffixes like '整' to prevent unauthorized decimal edits.
rmb-converter.highlight3Desc: Securely calculate large amounts locally. No financial data ever touches our servers.
rmb-converter.seoFooter: Suitable for PDF/Word contracts and bank counter filings.

image-to-ico.seoTitle: ICO Icon Wrapper: Generate Browser-Standard Favicon.ico
image-to-ico.seoDesc: Build authentic cross-platform *.ico binary blobs. Wraps resized PNGs inside true MS Windows ICON structure blocks for maximum compatibility.
